# July 03, 2025 Notice
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/03-07-25



### **Model Decommissioning Notice**

To continuously enhance platform service efficiency, focus on core product capability upgrades, and deliver more advanced, high-quality, and standardized services, Novita will decommission certain large language models (LLMs) on **July 5, 2025(UTC 0:00)**. **The deprecated models and their corresponding replacements** are listed below:

| **Deprecated Models**            | **Deprecation Date** | **Replacement Models** |
| :------------------------------- | :------------------- | :--------------------- |
| thudm/glm-z1-9b-0414             | 2025-7-5             | qwen/qwen3-4b-fp8      |
| thudm/glm-4-9b-0414              | 2025-7-5             | qwen/qwen3-4b-fp8      |
| thudm/glm-z1-rumination-32b-0414 | 2025-7-5             | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8     |
| thudm/glm-z1-32b-0414            | 2025-7-5             | qwen/qwen3-30b-a3b-fp8 |


# Nov 3, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/03-11-25



**Purpose**

Storage-related costs for Agent Sandbox have continued to increase, and the platform can no longer maintain free storage usage.To ensure sustainable operations and more efficient resource allocation, the Agent Sandbox Storage Billing feature has been launched.

**Billing Scope**

* Storage space used by Sandbox Templates
* Files and data retained when a Sandbox is paused

**Free Period**

A half-month free period is provided until November 17, 2025 (UTC).

During this period, users will not be charged and can check their usage at:

[https://novita.ai/sandbox-console/usage](https://novita.ai/sandbox-console/usage)

**Next Steps**

After the free period, storage billing will take effect. Users will be notified in advance via in-app messages or email.

Updated time: Nov 3, 2025


# August 8, 2025 Notice
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/04-08-25--08-08-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New Model Available: Qwen-Image**

  The **Qwen-Image** is a 20B MMDIT model for next-gen text-to-image generation. Especially strong at creating stunning graphic posters with native text.

  Key Highlights:

  * SOTA text rendering — rivals GPT-4o in English, best-in-class for Chinese
  * In-pixel text generation — no overlays, fully integrated
  * Bilingual support, diverse fonts, complex layouts

  Also excels at general image generation — from photorealistic to anime, impressionist to minimalist. A true creative powerhouse.

  Get started now: [Qwen-Image](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-qwen-txt2img#qwen-image-text-to-image)

  Updated time: August 6, 2025
* **New Model Available: Wan 2.2 Text to Video, Wan 2.2 Image to Video**

  Wan2.2 is the world's first open-source MoE-architecture video generation model with cinematic control. Its Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture scales model capacity without increasing computational requirements.

  Key Highlights:

  * First-of-its-kind MoE Architecture: The first model to apply an MoE framework to video generation, drastically cutting down on resource consumption.
  * 50% More Efficient: Saves approximately 50% of computational resources compared to models of a similar parameter scale.
  * Enhanced Capabilities: Achieves significant improvements in generating complex motion, character interactions, and overall aesthetic quality.

  Get started now: [Wan 2.2 Text to Video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-wan2.2-t2v), [Wan 2.2 Image to Video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-wan2.2-i2v)

  Updated time: August 8, 2025

***

## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Add region selection when creating an endpoint in Serverless**

  Novita now supports creating endpoints in selected regions.

  Updated time: August 5, 2025

# April 11, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/07-04-25--11-04-25



## **New Features**

* **Template Library Added to Console**

  1. We've added a Template Library to the console, featuring templates created by both the official team and the user community.
  2. In addition to deploying and saving templates, users are encouraged to **share templates** they like by copying the link **with a single click**.
  3. To contribute your own templates, simply **set the visibility** to Public when creating one. Public templates will appear in the Template Library, and those that gain popularity may be featured.

  Updated time: April 7, 2025
* **New Model: meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct-fp8**

  Novita has deployed **Llama 4 Maverick 17B Instruct (128E)** , a high-performance multimodal language model developed by Meta using a **Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)** architecture. The model dynamically activates 17 billion parameters per inference from a total of 400 billion parameters, distributed across 128 expert modules. It supports **text and image inputs in 12 languages**, and produces **text and code outputs**. Designed specifically for **vision-language tasks**, the model has been instruction-tuned to handle assistant-style interactions, image reasoning, and a wide range of general multimodal applications.

  Updated time: April 7, 2025
* **New Model: meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct**

  Novita has deployed **Llama 4 Scout 17B Instruct (16E)**, a **Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)** language model developed by Meta. The model dynamically activates 17 billion parameters per inference from a total of 109 billion parameters, utilizing 16 expert modules each time. It supports **multimodal inputs** (text and images) and generates **text or code outputs** in **12 languages**. Designed for **intelligent assistant interactions** and **visual reasoning tasks**, It also supports a **10 million-token context window**, and was trained on a **massive 40-trillion-token dataset**.

  Updated time: April 7, 2025

## **Improvements**

* **Improved Instance Status Visibility**

  Two new intermediate statuses—**“Starting”** and **“Stopping”**—have been introduced to provide **more granular visibility** during instance state transitions.

  Updated time: April 10, 2025


# July 11, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/07-07-25--11-07-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **MiniMax Speech-02 and MiniMax Voice Cloning Now Available on Novita**

  Novita now supports **MiniMax Speech-02-HD** and **MiniMax Speech-02-Turbo** audio generation models, along with the **MiniMax Voice Cloning** model.

  **MiniMax Speech-02** features powerful generalization capabilities, effortlessly handling speech across 32 languages, various accents, and a wide range of emotional tones. Since its release in May, it has consistently ranked No.1 globally on the Artificial Analysis leaderboard.

  **MiniMax Voice Cloning** is designed for use cases such as IP voice replication and timbre cloning, offering fast and accurate voice reproduction. It supports both mono and stereo voice cloning, enabling quick replication of a target voice from an audio sample.

  Get started now: [**MiniMax Speech-02-HD**](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-minimax-speech-02-hd)\[[**********; MiniMax Speech-02-Turbo; MiniMax Voice Cloning.**********](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-minimax-voice-cloning)]\([https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-minimax-speech-02-turbo](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-minimax-speech-02-turbo))

  Updated time: July 10, 2025
* **GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking Now Available on Novita**

  As a lightweight model with 9 billion parameters, **GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking** delivers impressive performance—matching or even surpassing the 72B-parameter Qwen-2.5-VL-72B in 18 out of 28 authoritative benchmark evaluations.

  It excels in image-text understanding, scientific and mathematical reasoning, and video comprehension tasks. The model also supports ultra-high-resolution images up to 4K and accepts inputs with arbitrary aspect ratios.

  Get started now: [**GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking**](https://novita.ai/models/llm/thudm-glm-4.1v-9b-thinking)**.**

  Updated time: July 10, 2025
* **Kimi-K2-Instruct Now Available on Novita**

  **Kimi K2** is a state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model featuring 32 billion active parameters and 1 trillion total parameters.

  Trained with the Muon optimizer, Kimi K2 delivers exceptional performance in frontier knowledge tasks, reasoning, and coding. It is also carefully optimized for agent capabilities—designed specifically for tool use, advanced reasoning, and autonomous problem solving.

  Get started now: [**Kimi-K2-Instruct**](https://novita.ai/models/llm/thudm-glm-4.1v-9b-thinking)

  Updated time: July 11, 2025

***

## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Instance migration supports migrating system disks**

  Supports instance migration and also supports migrating the system disk. After migration, instance information (such as instance ID, egress IP, etc.) will not change. After migration, the mirroring will be stored in the Novita official mirroring repository. If the system disk is migrated, the system disk data will be packaged into a mirroring and migrated together to the new resource. The new mirroring contains the system disk data and is ready to use immediately.

  Updated time: July 7, 2025
* **GPU Instance metrics**

  Supports real-time monitoring of the following data:

  * CPU Utilization
  * Memory Utilization
  * GPU Utilization
  * Video Memory Utilization
  * System Disk Utilization

  Updated time: July 9, 2025

# March 14, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/10-03-25--14-03-25



## **New Features**

* **Embedding Model-BAAI: BGE-M3 is Added to Model Library**

  Novita supports the `baai/bge-m3` text embedding model. This model is capable of simultaneously achieving three core functionalities: dense retrieval, multi-vector retrieval, and sparse retrieval. Designed to be compatible with over 100 languages, it supports a variety of input formats, ranging from short sentences to long texts of up to 8,192 tokens.

  For detailed usage instructions, please refer to the API documentation: [Model-BAAI: BGE-M3](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-llm-create-embeddings)

  Updated time: March 13, 2025
* **Login Security: Limit on Incorrect Password Attempts**

  To enhance account security, a login attempt limit has been implemented: Maximum 5 incorrect passwords within 1 hour.

  Updated time: March 11, 2025

## **Improvements**

* **Pricing Update for Wan 2.1 T2V Video Model**

  Optimized pricing strategy for video generation models: The pricing for all resolutions is now standardized at \$0.08 per second.

  Updated time: March 10, 2025


# April 11, 2024
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/11-04-24



We've recently added more hot LLM models for you, now the supported models include:

* lzlv\_70b ([https://huggingface.co/lizpreciatior/lzlv\\\_70b\\\_fp16\\\_hf](https://huggingface.co/lizpreciatior/lzlv\\_70b\\_fp16\\_hf))

* Nous-Hermes-2-Mixtral-8x7B-DPO ([https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Nous-Hermes-2-Mixtral-8x7B-DPO](https://huggingface.co/NousResearch/Nous-Hermes-2-Mixtral-8x7B-DPO))

* gryphe/mythomax-l2-13b ([https://huggingface.co/Gryphe/MythoMax-L2-13b](https://huggingface.co/Gryphe/MythoMax-L2-13b))

# August 15, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/11-08-25--15-08-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Batch Inference API for Large Language Models**

  Our Batch Inference API enables asynchronous processing of high-volume inference requests while maintaining full compatibility with the OpenAI API standard. This cost-efficient solution is ideal when immediate results aren't required, offering significantly higher rate limits than online calls while guaranteeing delivery within a reasonable 48-hour window.

  Perfect for:

  • Evaluation and data analysis at scale

  • Large dataset classification

  • Offline document summarization generation

  **Pricing:** Available at 50% off standard model inference API rates.

  Updated time: August 13, 2025
* **New Model Available: Vidu Q1**

  **Vidu Q1** is a multimodal video generation model globally launched by Shengshu Technology in April 2025. It features direct output capability at 1080P resolution and AI sound synchronization functionality. The model achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in video quality and semantic consistency metrics on VBench-1.0, as well as in commonsense reasoning and physical understanding dimensions on VBench-2.0. Additionally, it ranks first in both anime and realistic style categories on the SuperCLUE text-to-video leaderboard in China.

  Discover the power of Vidu Q1 on Novita by exploring its [text-to-video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-vidu-q1-txt2video), [image-to-video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-vidu-q1-img2video), [start-end-to-video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-vidu-q1-startend2video), and [reference-to-video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-vidu-q1-reference2video) generation capabilities—and bring your creative ideas to life.

  Updated time: August 14, 2025
* **New Model Available: Vidu 2.0**

  **Vidu 2.0** is a multimodal video generation model globally launched by Shengshu Technology in January 2025. It can generate a single 4-second video clip at 512P resolution within 10 seconds, delivering more consistent styles and themes, smoother transitions between the first and last frames, and producing four materials in one go—doubling efficiency.

  Discover the efficiency of Vidu 2.0 on this platform by exploring its [image-to-video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-vidu-2.0-img2video), [start-end-to-video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-vidu-2.0-startend2video), and [reference-to-video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-vidu-2.0-reference2video) generation capabilities—and see how effortless video creation can be.

  Updated time: August 14, 2025

Building on our last update, where we brought you unbeatable pricing on Llama 3.1 8B, our team has kept working hard to bring even more savings across our platform!

📉 New Pricing for LLama 3.1 70B Instruct

* Input: **\$0.34/Mtokens** (↓33.3% from \$0.51)
* Output: **\$0.39/Mtokens** (↓47.2% from \$0.74)

These new rates are live on both Novita AI and OpenRouter, where we've secured the #1 spot for competitive pricing.


# May 16, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/12-05-25--16-05-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **Improvements**

* **Hunyuan Video Fast Now 67% Cheaper**

  We’ve significantly reduced the pricing for the Hunyuan Video Fast model — **now only one-third of the original price**. Enjoy high-quality video generation at a much lower cost.

  Updated time: May 13, 2025

***

## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Compute Capacity Expanded to Cover All Major Continents**

  Our global compute footprint continues to grow. Leveraging a distributed resource pool, we now offer GPU services across all major continents—empowering customers worldwide.

  **New Regions:**

  1. **Middle East:** United Arab Emirates (AS-AE-01)
  2. **Europe:** United Kingdom (EU-GB-01)
  3. **South Asia:** India (AS-IN-01)
  4. **South America:** Brazil (SA-BR-01)

  Updated time: May 13, 2025

### **Improvements**

* **Explore & Instances Interface Enhancements**

  We’ve refined both the Explore and Instances pages to surface more information and streamline interactions:

  1. Display architecture names for H100, H200, and A100 GPU card types
  2. On the Explore page, display the maximum GPUs supported per server as "\[card count] max" and streamline the per-instance GPU selector.
  3. On the Instances page, display the number of GPUs configured for each instance

  Updated time: May 15, 2025

# April 18, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/14-04-25--18-04-25



## **New Features**

* **Sign Up with Google, GitHub, or Hugging Face Now Supported**

  Users can now register quickly and securely using their existing **Google**, **GitHub**, or **Hugging Face** accounts—no need to create a new password.

  Updated time: April 17, 2025
* **Rate Limit Display Added for LLM Usage in Console**

  The console now displays **rate limit information** for large language models (LLMs), allowing users to easily view the default request limits for each model and better plan their usage.

  In addition, a new rate limit increase request entry has been added, enabling users to submit requests for higher limits based on specific business needs.

  Updated time: April 17, 2025
* **New Video Model Added: Wan 2.1 I2V**

  The **Wan 2.1 I2V (Image-to-Video)** model is now available on the platform. It enables the generation of continuous video sequences from a single input image.

  This model delivers strong performance in **motion consistency**, **visual stability**, and **detail fidelity**, making it well-suited for **creative content generation**, **virtual character animation**, and related use cases.

  Updated time: April 16, 2025
* **Pricing Update for Video Model Wan 2.1 T2V**

  We’ve introduced a **resolution-based pricing model** for the **Wan 2.1 T2V (Text-to-Video)** model.\
  Users are now charged based on the output video resolution, enabling more flexible and cost-effective usage based on quality requirements.

  Updated time: April 16, 2025
* **Function Calling Now Supported on meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct-fp8**

  The model `meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct-fp8` supports the function call feature. For usage instructions, please refer to the [documentation](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/llm-function-calling).

  Updated time: April 14, 2025
* **Function Calling Now Supported on meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct**

  The model `meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct` supports the function call feature. For usage instructions, please refer to the [documentation](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/llm-function-calling).

  Updated time: April 14, 2025


# May 14, 2025 Notice
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/14-05-25



### **Model Decommissioning Notice**

To continuously enhance platform service efficiency, focus on core product capability upgrades, and deliver more advanced, high-quality, and standardized services, Novita will decommission certain large language models (LLMs) on **May 28, 2025(UTC 00:00)** . **The deprecated models and their corresponding replacements** are listed below:

| **Deprecated Models**                    | **Deprecation Date** | **Replacement Models**            |
| :--------------------------------------- | :------------------- | :-------------------------------- |
| jondurbin/airoboros-l2-70b               | 2025-5-28            | sao10k/l3-70b-euryale-v2.1        |
| qwen/qwen3-14b-fp8                       | 2025-5-28            | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8                |
| qwen/qwen3-0.6b-fp8                      | 2025-5-28            | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8                |
| qwen/qwen3-1.7b-fp8                      | 2025-5-28            | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8                |
| meta-llama/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct | 2025-5-28            | qwen/qwen2.5-vl-72b-instruct      |
| google/gemma-2-9b-it                     | 2025-5-28            | google/gemma-3-27b-it             |
| meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct        | 2025-5-28            | meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct |
| qwen/qwq-32b                             | 2025-5-28            | meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct |


# July 18, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/14-07-25--18-07-25



## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **GPU Instance Spot Pricing**

  Advantages of Functional Features:

  1. Greatest Advantage: **Affordable!! The price is generally 50% off the on-demand price**, making it highly price-competitive in the market. For example, the current price of 4090 is \$0.35, while the spot 4090 price is as low as \$0.18, and larger usage volumes may result in greater discounts.
  2. Why is it so cheap? Spot instances are essentially designed to handle idle inventory, so **they may be reclaimed at any time due to resource shortages** (instance termination).
  3. How can we ensure the stability of our customers' business as much as possible while keeping costs low? Our spot billing instances will adopt the following strategies:
     * After creation, it enjoys **a 1-hour grace period**, during which the instance is guaranteed not to be reclaimed
     * Before resource recycling, a notice will be sent **1 hour in advance, and another notice will be sent 5 minutes before instance recycling**. When customers receive the notice, they can back up their data, while we give customers more time to back up their data!

  Updated time: July 18, 2025

***

## **Agent SandBox Updates**

### **New Features**

* **The product page for Agent Sandbox is now live**

  This page provides a concise overview of Agent Sandbox's core features, use cases, pricing model, and helpful documentation, enabling users to quickly get started and explore its powerful capabilities.

  **Agent Sandbox** is a high-performance cloud runtime purpose-built for **AI Agent workloads**, designed to support the full lifecycle of autonomous agents.

  Key features include:

  * **Millisecond-Level Startup**
  * **Secure Isolation**
  * **High Concurrency**

  Explore the [Agent Sandbox](https://novita.ai/sandbox) product page to discover more details!

  Updated time: July 18, 2025


# September 19, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/15-09-25--19-09-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Seedream-4.0 Now Available**

  Seedream is a state-of-the-art (SOTA) multimodal image creation model based on a cutting-edge architecture. It breaks the creative boundaries of traditional text-to-image models by natively supporting text, single-image, and multi-image inputs. Users can freely combine text and images to enable diverse creative approaches within the same model, including multi-image fusion creation with subject consistency, image editing, and batch image generation. This makes image creation more free and controllable.

  Charges are based on the actual number of images generated; no fees will be incurred for failed generation.

  Updated time: September 19, 2025

***

## **Agent SandBox Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Metrics History Available for Paused Sandboxes**

  When a Sandbox is in Paused state, you can now access metrics data from up to 72 hours before the last pause time.  This enhancement allows developers to review and analyze recent activity even after a Sandbox has been paused.

  Updated time: September 18, 2025


# January 16, 2025
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/16-01-25



We're excited to bring DeepSeek V3, a state-of-the-art MoE language model, to Novita AI!

Why Choose DeepSeek V3?

* A robust 671B total parameter model, outperforming open-source peers and rivaling top-tier closed-source models.
* Performs exceptionally well for coding tasks, making it a great companion for developers.
* Handle complex inputs with 16K context size and 16K max output.
* Just \$0.89/M tokens, delivering exceptional value without compromising performance.

How to Access DeepSeek-V3:

* Explore it through our Playground: [https://novita.ai/models/llm/deepseek-deepseek\_v3](https://novita.ai/models/llm/deepseek-deepseek_v3);
* Use it seamlessly via OpenRouter: [https://openrouter.ai/deepseek/deepseek-chat](https://openrouter.ai/deepseek/deepseek-chat).

Experience the future of AI—try DeepSeek V3 today! 🚀


# June 20, 2025 Product Updates

## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **MiniMax-Hailuo-02 Now Available on Novita**

  Novita now supports MiniMax’s latest high-performance video generation model — **Hailuo 02**.

  Hailuo 02 delivers industry-leading instruction-following capabilities and excels at generating videos in complex physical scenarios, including high-intensity stunt simulations. It supports ultra-high-definition video generation, with:

  * Up to **6 seconds** at **768P or 1080P**
  * Up to **10 seconds** at **768P**

  Explore more creative possibilities with one of the most advanced video models available.

# Weekly Product Updates - March 21, 2025
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/17-03-25--21-03-25



## **New Features**

* **LLM Full Model Upgrade: Function Calling & Structured Outputs Available Now**

  Novita now supports Function Calling and Structured Outputs for all capability-supported models on the platform. Developers can now filter models using these tags for more precise API integration and structured data generation that aligned with custom schemas. Refer to the API documentation for details: [**Function calling**](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/llm-function-calling) & [**Structured Outputs**](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/llm-structured-outputs)

  Updated time: March 21, 2025
* **Image Dedicated Endpoint now supports billing queries**

  Billing for Image Dedicated Endpoints now includes monthly query support.

  Updated time: March 21, 2025
* **The annual and monthly subscription functionality of GPU Instance is now officially released**

  1. **Flexible Billing Model:** Users can freely choose between on-demand and monthly subscription when launching instances.
  2. **Enhanced Resource Guarantee:** During the monthly subscription period, even if an instance is shut down, it remains reserved for the user, significantly enhancing the user experience.
  3. **Seamless Service Transition:** Supports converting on-demand instances to annual or monthly subscriptions, as well as renewals during the subscription period.
  4. **Monthly Subscription Discounts:** Monthly subscriptions start at a 10% discount over pay-as-you-go, with additional saving for longer terms.

  Updated time: March 19, 2025
* **Team members' nicknames are now displayed in the task lists for Instance, Serverless GPUs, and more**

  When the account is in Team mode, the GPUs Console now displays member nicknames.

  Updated time: March 18, 2025


# August 22, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/18-08-25--22-08-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New Model Available: MiniMax Speech-2.5**

  Novita now features MiniMax's next-generation Text-to-Speech models: **Speech-2.5-HD** and **Speech-2.5-Rurbo**. Speech 2.5 represents a major breakthrough in voice generation, delivering significant advancements in multi-language expressiveness, voice cloning fidelity, and language coverage.

  Speech-2.5-HD (High-Fidelity):The latest HD model, offering exceptional prosody and remarkable voice cloning accuracy.Specifically designed for high-quality audio applications, providing studio-grade, high-fidelity sound.

  Speech-2.5-Turbo:The latest Turbo model, engineered for extreme responsiveness and ultra-low latency.Ideal for high-concurrency, real-time scenarios and includes support for 40 languages.

  Get started now: [MiniMax Speech-2.5-hd-preview Text to Speech](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-minimax-speech-2.5-hd-preview), [MiniMax Speech-2.5-turbo-preview Text to Speech](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-minimax-speech-2.5-turbo-preview)

  Updated time: August 21, 2025
* **New Model Available: Qwen-Image-Edit**

  Built upon the powerful 20B Qwen-Image model, Qwen-Image-Edit extends its unique text rendering capabilities into the image editing domain, enabling highly precise in-image text manipulation.

  Key Highlights:

  * **Comprehensive Editing:** Supports a full spectrum of edits, from precise local adjustments (adding, removing, or modifying elements while keeping the rest of the image intact) to high-level creative edits (like IP creation, object rotation, and style transfer).
  * **Precise Text Editing:** Directly add, delete, or modify both Chinese and English text within an image while perfectly preserving the original font, size, and style.
  * **SOTA Performance:** Achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on multiple public benchmarks, establishing it as a powerful foundational model for image editing tasks.

  Get started now:[**Qwen-Image-Edit**](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-qwen-image-edit)

  Updated time: August 21, 2025
* **New Model Available: Pixverse V4.5 Text to Video, Pixverse V4.5 Image to Video**

  Pixverse 4.5 is the latest AI video model released by Pixverse AI. It introduces major upgrades in cinematic control, multi-image fusion, and complex motion handling.

  Key Highlights:

  * **20+ Cinematic Camera Controls:** Access over 20 camera controls like panning and zooming, all precisely guided by text prompts for professional-grade results.
  * **Multi-Image Reference & Fusion:** Seamlessly fuse elements from multiple reference images with the new Fusion mode for richer, stylistically consistent videos.
  * **Optimized Complex Motion:** Superior handling of complex actions like high-speed movement and group interactions, delivering smoother and more natural animations.

  Get started now:[ Pixverse V4.5 Text to Video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-pixverse-v4.5-t2v), [PixVerse V4.5 Image to Video](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-pixverse-v4.5-i2v)

  Updated time: August 21, 2025

***

## **Platform Service Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Budget Management Now Live for Teams**

  Our new Budget Management feature is now available, giving you precise control over your team's API spending. This system is designed to help you efficiently manage member-level spending limits, with key capabilities including:

  * **Member-Level Budget Control:** Assign unique spending caps to individual team members.
  * **Smart Enforcement & Alerts:** Automatically prevent cost overruns and receive timely notifications.
  * **Flexible Budget Types:** Implement one-time or recurring (daily, weekly, or monthly) budgets.
  * **Real-Time Adjustments:** Instantly modify budget allocations as your needs change.

  To get started, visit [Billing > Budgets](https://novita.ai/billing/budgets) in your console. For more details, please see our [help documentation](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/budgets).

  **Updated:** August 20, 2025


# January 19, 2026 Product Updates

## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Added Automatic Instance Migration for newly GPU instance**

  The GPU **Automatic Instance Migration** entry has been relocated to the **Instance Management** page, and now supports configuring migration policies at the **instance** level. To ensure business continuity, **Automatic Instance Migration** will be enabled by default for **newly created resources starting at 2026**. # May 23, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/19-05-25--23-05-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Kling V1.6: Now Supports 10-Second Video Generation**

  Kling V1.6 now supports generating videos up to 10 seconds long, enabling more complete and coherent visual storytelling. Ideal for short narratives, ad snippets, and dynamic showcases. Get started now:  [Novita AI KLING V1.6 Text to Video API | Generate videos from text](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-kling-v1.6-t2v) and [Novita AI KLING V1.6 Image to Video API | Generate videos from images](https://novita.ai/docs/api-reference/model-apis-kling-v1.6-i2v).

  Updated time: May 21, 2025

***

## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New GPU Type L40S Now Available**

  The **L40S** is a **high-performance data center GPU** from NVIDIA, built on the Ada Lovelace architecture. It is optimized for **multi-tasking scenarios** such as AI inference, large model training, graphics rendering, and virtualization. The L40S is well-suited for **inference and training of medium to large language models** like LLaMA, GPT, and BERT, as well as for **Stable Diffusion and image/video generation**. It supports concurrent operation of multiple hardware engines and offers excellent **multi-user VM deployment** and **GPU virtualization capabilities**. Get started now: [Novita AI](https://novita.ai/gpus-console).

  Updated time: May 23, 2025

The **Team** feature is now available.

**With Team, you can:**

* Convert your personal account into a team account or join an existing team to collaborate with others;
* Invite other users to join your team, and share the team's resources with them;
* Manage your members' permissions to the team's resources by assigning different roles;
* Analyze usage data for each team member.

# April 25, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/21-04-25--25-04-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New Models: The GLM-4-0414 Series and the Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct Model**

  As early as March this year, Zhipu AI had announced plans to open source new GLM models in mid-April, and true to their word, the GLM-4-0414 series was launched on schedule. The newly open-sourced models cover three categories: **foundation, reasoning, and reflection**. According to official data, some models in this series can rival OpenAI’s GPT-4o and DeepSeek’s V3/R1 series in performance.

  As a one-stop AIGC cloud service platform, Novita promptly launched the above models along with a limited-time free version of the Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct model. Novita also carried out full-chain optimization on the models, significantly reducing inference latency while maintaining the original model accuracy. Developers can efficiently access and utilize these models through API interfaces.

  1. [thudm/glm-4-9b-0414](https://novita.ai/models/llm/thudm-glm-4-9b-0414)
  2. [thudm/glm-z1-9b-0414](https://novita.ai/models/llm/thudm-glm-z1-9b-0414)
  3. [thudm/glm-z1-32b-0414](https://novita.ai/models/llm/thudm-glm-z1-32b-0414)
  4. [thudm/glm-4-32b-0414](https://novita.ai/models/llm/thudm-glm-4-32b-0414)
  5. [thudm/glm-z1-rumination-32b-0414](https://novita.ai/models/llm/thudm-glm-z1-rumination-32b-0414)

  Updated time: April 25, 2025
* **New Product: LLM Dedicated Endpoint**

  Novita introduces LLM Dedicated Endpoint – a fully managed, high-performance AI deployment solution. Designed for scaling teams and growing businesses, it delivers reliable, high-performance AI infrastructure without the complexity of self-management.\_For details, see:  [Dedicated Endpoint](https://novita.ai/dedicated-endpoint)

  Updated time: April 22, 2025
* **Novita Referral Vouchers Now Usable Across All LLM Models**

  Novita's referral program vouchers can be used with all LLM models, subject to applicable rate limits. For details, see: [llm-rate-limits](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/llm-rate-limits)

  Updated time: April 21, 2025

***

## **GPUs Updates**

### **Improvements**

* **Optimized Storage Architecture for GPU Container Instances**

  To address the overlap between system disks and local disks, we have updated the instance storage policy. Effective immediately, the option to configure **a local disk for new instances has been discontinued**. Instances and templates that have already been created with local disk settings will remain unaffected.

  Following these changes, instances now support **system disk expansion**. For instances that have existing local disks, users can now unmount or resize the local disk space. When local storage is unmounted, all associated data will be automatically migrated to the system disk to ensure data continuity.\
  For more details, please refer to the [Instance Management](https://novita.ai/gpus-console/instances) page.

  Updated time: April 24, 2025


# July 25, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/21-07-25--25-07-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New Model Available: Qwen3 Coder 480B A35B Instruct**

  Novita now supports **Qwen3 Coder 480B A35B Instruct**, the cutting-edge open-source coding model from the Qwen team. This model delivers performance on par with Claude Sonnet for agentic coding, browser automation, and other core development tasks, enabling highly efficient code generation and the handling of complex problems.

  Get started now: [**Qwen3 Coder 480B A35B Instruct**](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct)

  Updated time: July 23, 2025
* **New Model Available: Qwen3 235B A22b Thinking 2507**

  Novita now supports Qwen3 235B A22B Instruct 2507, a powerful Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model designed for ultimate performance and efficiency. By activating just 22B of its 235B parameters during inference, it dynamically handles diverse tasks with incredible speed.

  With its native 262k-token context window, the model excels at demanding use cases, including analyzing long documents, comprehending full code repositories, and performing complex multi-paragraph reasoning.

  Get started now: [**Qwen3 235B A22b Thinking 2507**](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-235b-a22b-thinking-2507)

  Updated time: July 23, 2025

***

  Non-MoE Models are now systematically sorted by vendor/manufacturer for clear differentiation

  Dedicated MoE (Mixture of Experts) category added and placed at the end of the page for quick access

  Updated time: July 22, 2025

# August 29, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/25-08-25--29-08-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New Model Available**

  **Kling V2.1**:

  Kling V2.1 is the latest evolution of Kuaishou’s AI-powered video‑generation model, designed to seamlessly create short, cinematic‑quality clips from a single image or a text prompt. It represents a major leap forward from Kling 2.0, emphasizing motion fidelity, visual coherence, and prompt accuracy.

  **Kling 2.1 Master**:

  The premium endpoint for Kling 2.1, designed for top-tier image-to-video generation with unparalleled motion fluidity, cinematic visuals, exceptional prompt precision, and 1080p video quality.

  **Seedance V1 Lite**:

  Seedance V1 Lite is an AI video model designed for coherent multi-shot video generation, offering smooth motion and precise adherence to detailed prompts. It supports resolutions of 480p, 720p, and 1080p.

  **Seedance V1 Pro**:

  Seedance V1 Pro is an AI video model designed for coherent multi-shot video generation, offering smooth motion and precise adherence to detailed prompts. It supports resolutions of 480p, 720p, and 1080p.

  Updated time: August 29, 2025

***

## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Self-migration function of faulty devices**

  When a user enables automatic migration, in the event of device failure, the system will automatically migrate the instance to a healthy node within the same cluster, and the instance ID, port mapping address, etc. will remain unchanged;

  It should be noted that:

  1. During the migration process, the user's instance will still experience**short-term interruption**, and the interruption time depends on the size of the system disk;
  2. Therefore, this feature is very suitable for **stateless tasks**. For stateful tasks, it is recommended not to enable this feature for the time being. After receiving a fault notification, users can choose to perform migration during off-peak business hours. In the future, we will also upgrade the feature for this scenario;

  Updated time: August 25, 2025


# LLM Serverless Model Deprecation Notice
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/25-12-25



**Dear Developer,**

We are writing to inform you of upcoming changes to our **Serverless Endpoints**.

As part of our regular product lifecycle management to ensure high performance and resource optimization, we will be deprecating a list of specific models on **January 8, 2026 (UTC)**.

**You have 14 days** from today to update your integration before these models are removed from the **Serverless Endpoints**.

***

## Impacted Models & Recommended Alternatives

Please refer to the table below to see if your application is using any of the impacted models and find their recommended alternatives:

| **Deprecated model**                  | **Recommended alternatives**      |
| :------------------------------------ | :-------------------------------- |
| baichuan/baichuan-m2-32b              | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8                |
| paddlepaddle/paddleocr-vl             | qwen/qwen3-vl-8b-instruct         |
| qwen/qwen3-reranker-8b                | baai/bge-reranker-v2-m3           |
| deepseek/deepseek-ocr                 | qwen/qwen3-vl-235b-a22b-instruct  |
| thudm/glm-4.1v-9b-thinking            | zai-org/glm-4.6v                  |
| deepseek/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-14b | deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528         |
| meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct      | meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct |
| google/gemma-3-12b-it                 | google/gemma-3-27b-it             |
| gryphe/mythomax-l2-13b                | deepseek/deepseek-v3-0324         |
| deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528-qwen3-8b    | deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528         |
| deepseek/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-32b | deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528         |
| qwen/qwen3-8b-fp8                     | qwen/qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct  |

***

## What actions should you take?

To avoid service interruption, please choose one of the following options before the deadline:

### Option 1: Switch to the Alternative (Recommended)

Update your API code to point to the **Recommended Alternative** listed above.

These newer models offer improved reasoning capabilities, faster inference speeds, and better cost-efficiency.

### Option 2: Continue Using Legacy Models (via Dedicated Endpoints)

If your workflow strictly requires a specific version from the deprecated list (e.g., for reproducibility or specific fine-tuning), you can deploy it on your own private GPU resources using our **Dedicated Endpoints**.

* **Benefit:** This guarantees exclusive access, zero cold starts, and consistent performance.
* **Action:** [https://novita.ai/dedicated-endpoint](https://novita.ai/dedicated-endpoint)

***

## Timeline

* **Announcement Date:** December 25, 2025
* **End of Life (EOL):** January 8, 2026 (UTC)

**Note:** After the EOL date, API requests to any models in the **Deprecated** list via Serverless Endpoints will result in an error.

If you have any questions or need assistance with the migration, please reach out to us via our **Discord** community or submit a support ticket.

Best regards,

**The Novita AI Team**

# May 30, 2025 Product Updates

## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New Model Available: DeepSeek-R1-0528**

  Novita now supports the latest high-performance DeepSeek model — [**DeepSeek-R1-0528**](https://novita.ai/models/llm/deepseek-deepseek-r1-0528).

  Released by the DeepSeek team as an open-source model, DeepSeek-R1-0528 features impressive reasoning capabilities, particularly achieving performance comparable to OpenAI's o1 model in mathematics, coding, and reasoning tasks.

  Updated time: May 28, 2025

### **Discontinued Features**

* **Certain LLMs Officially Decommissioned**

  To continuously improve model performance and enhance user experience, several large language models (LLMs) have now been officially decommissioned. Below is the list of retired models along with their recommended replacements:

  | **Deprecated Models**                    | **Deprecation Date** | **Replacement Models**            |
  | :--------------------------------------- | :------------------- | :-------------------------------- |
  | jondurbin/airoboros-l2-70b               | 2025-05-28           | sao10k/l3-70b-euryale-v2.1        |
  | qwen/qwen3-14b-fp8                       | 2025-05-28           | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8                |
  | qwen/qwen3-0.6b-fp8                      | 2025-05-28           | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8                |
  | qwen/qwen3-1.7b-fp8                      | 2025-05-28           | qwen/qwen3-32b-fp8                |
  | meta-llama/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct | 2025-05-28           | qwen/qwen2.5-vl-72b-instruct      |
  | google/gemma-2-9b-it                     | 2025-05-28           | google/gemma-3-27b-it             |
  | meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct        | 2025-05-28           | meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct |
  | qwen/qwq-32b                             | 2025-05-28           | meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct |

  If you encounter any issues during this transition, please don’t hesitate to contact our technical support team.

  Updated time: May 28, 2025

***

## **GPUs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **New Bare Metal Server Reservation Page Launched**

  Novita has launched a [**bare metal server reservation interface**](https://novita.ai/gpu-baremetal) on the official website. Users can now browse available GPU models that support bare metal services, along with detailed configuration information.

  **Bare metal** refers to a computing service that provides **direct access to physical servers without a virtualization layer**, offering superior performance, greater control, and lower latency. It is ideal for scenarios with high demands on resource isolation and computing power, such as deep learning, AI model training, and large-scale inference.

  If you require bare metal resources, you can **select your preferred GPU model and complete the reservation online** to gain exclusive access to dedicated physical servers.

  Updated time: May 30, 2025

# Nov 11, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/27-10-25--07-11-25



## **Agent Sandbox Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Agent Sandbox Storage Billing**

  Agent Sandbox storage billing is now enabled to address increasing storage costs and support sustainable operations.

  **Billing Scope:**

  * Storage used by Sandbox Templates

  * Data retained when a Sandbox is paused

  **Free Period:**\
  Free until **November 17, 2025 (UTC)**.\
  Users can view usage at: [https://novita.ai/sandbox-console/usage](https://novita.ai/sandbox-console/usage)

  **Next Steps:**\
  Billing will begin after the free period. Users will be notified in advance via in-app message or email.

  Updated time: Nov 3, 2025
* **Sandbox Auto Pause and Resume**

  Sandboxes now automatically enter a paused state during inactivity and seamlessly resume when accessed again.

  This helps reduce unnecessary resource usage while ensuring fast recovery when workloads restart.

  Guide → [*Sandbox Auto Pause and Resume*](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/sandbox-auto-persistence)

  Updated time: Nov 6, 2025
* **Sandbox Auto Pause and Resume**

  Sandboxes now automatically enter a paused state during inactivity and seamlessly resume when accessed again.

  This helps reduce unnecessary resource usage while ensuring fast recovery when workloads restart.

  Guide → [*Sandbox Auto Pause and Resume*](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/sandbox-auto-persistence)

  Updated time: Nov 6, 2025
* **Sandbox Clone**

  You can now duplicate an existing Sandbox—including its code, environment state, and configurations—with a single click.

  This is ideal for parallel experimentation, debugging, or creating environment snapshots.

  Guide → [*Sandbox Clone*](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/sandbox-clone)

  Updated time: Nov 6, 2025
* **Sandbox Idle Timeout**

  Sandboxes will automatically shut down after a configurable idle period.\
  This helps avoid unexpected costs and ensures better resource hygiene for long-running projects.

  Guide → [*Sandbox Idle Timeout*](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/sandbox-idle-timeout)

  Updated time: Nov 6, 2025
* **Template Version Management**

  Sandbox templates now support full version lifecycle management.\
  You can create, publish, update, or roll back template versions—making environment consistency and team collaboration much easier.

  Guide → [*Template Version Management*](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/sandbox-template-version-management)

  Updated time: Nov 6, 2025

# April 30, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/28-04-25--30-04-25



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Rate Limits Now Applied to Image, Video, and Audio APIs**

  Rate limiting has been enabled for the **Image, Video, and Audio API products** to ensure reliable performance and fair usage:

  1. **IPM (Images Per Minute)**: Caps the number of images that can be generated per minute.
  2. **RPM (Requests Per Minute)**: Limits total API calls per minute across all endpoints.

  If your requests exceed the set thresholds, rate limit errors will be returned.

  You can check your current limits and request higher quotas directly in the console. Look for the **“Increase Limit”** button next to each metric if your use case requires more capacity.

  Updated time: April 30, 2025
* **Five Qwen3 Series Models Now Available**

  We’ve added five new models from the Qwen3 series on Novita.:

  1. [Qwen3 0.6B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-0.6b-fp8)
  2. [Qwen3 1.7B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-1.7b-fp8)
  3. [Qwen3 4B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-4b-fp8)
  4. [Qwen3 8B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-8b-fp8)
  5. [Qwen3 14B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-14b-fp8)

  Updated time: April 30, 2025
* **New Model: DeepSeek Prover V2 671B**

  Novita supports [**DeepSeek Prover V2 671B**](https://novita.ai/models/llm/deepseek-deepseek-prover-v2-671b) via Serverless Endpoints.

  Updated time: April 30, 2025
* **Updated LLM API Rate Limits**

  User accounts are now automatically tiered into **L1-L5 service levels** based on **recent top-up amount**, with each tier granting different **RPM (Requests Per Minute)** and **TPM (Tokens Per Minute)** limits. For more details, please refer to [Rate limits - Documentation](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/llm-rate-limits).

  Updated time: April 30, 2025
* **First Batch of Large-Parameter Qwen3 Models Now Available**

  Three large-parameter Qwen3 models have been newly launched:

  1. [Qwen3-235B-A22B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-235b-a22b-fp8)
  2. [Qwen3-30B-A3B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-30b-a3b-fp8)
  3. [Qwen3-32B](https://novita.ai/models/llm/qwen-qwen3-32b-fp8)

  Updated time: April 29, 2025

# July 4, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/30-06-25-04-07-2025



## **Model APIs Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Novita LLMs Dedicated Endpoints**

  Fully Managed Deployment for Your Custom AI Models

  High cost performance

  * Deploy available models and LoRA adapters on customizable GPU endpoints with per-hour billing.
  * Lower prices, No hard rate limits, Cheaper under high utilization, Custom base models and multiple LoRAs, Predictable performance unaffected.

    Learn more about [Pricing](https://novita.ai/pricing) and read this [Blog](https://blogs.novita.ai/deploy-custom-base-model-with-llm-dedicated-endpoint/) to learn how to deploy a custom base model with Novita LLMs Dedicated Endpoints.

  Updated time: July 4, 2025

***

## **Agent SandBox Updates**

### **New Features**

* **Agent Sandbox Is Now Live**

  **Agent Sandbox** is a high-performance cloud runtime purpose-built for **AI Agent workloads**, designed to support the full lifecycle of autonomous agents.

  Key capabilities include:

  * Millisecond-level startup, optimized for high-concurrency tasks
  * **Multi-language support**, including Python, JavaScript, and C++
  * Enables **code execution, web access, and system-level interactions**
  * **Per-second billing** for vCPU and memory — flexible, cost-efficient usage

  As the **infrastructure foundation for the runtime era of AI Agents**, Agent Sandbox empowers the next generation of generative agents with fast, scalable, and reliable execution capabilities.

  Visit the [**Documentation**](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/sandbox-overview) Center to learn more.

  Updated time: June 30, 2025

***

## **Platform Service Updates**

### **Improvements**

* **In-App Messaging Now Live for Critical Notifications**

  Our new **in-app messaging system** is now available, allowing you to receive important platform-level updates in one place, including:

  * **GPU failures, service interruptions, and operational alerts**
  * **Account-related notices**, such as coupon delivery or login activity
  * **Promotional events and platform campaigns**

  All messages can be viewed in your **Message Center** in the console. Stay informed, effortlessly.

  Updated time: July 1, 2025

***


# April 04, 2025 Product Updates
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/31-03-25--04-04-25



## **New Features**

* **Added Support for Hugging Face Login**

  Users can now sign in using their Hugging Face account. Social login now supports Hugging Face in addition to Google and GitHub.

  Updated time: April 02, 2025
* **Added Qwen2.5 VL 72B Instruct to the Model Library**

  Qwen2.5 VL 72B Instruct is the latest high-performance multimodal large language model launched by Novita.

  Featuring enhanced visual comprehension capabilities, it also demonstrates strong performance in complex reasoning and decision-making tasks.

  Updated time: March 31, 2025
* **Added Gemma-3-27b-it to the Model Library**

  Gemma-3-27b-it is the latest high-performance multimodal large language model launched by Novita.

  Built on Gemini 2.0 architecture, it possesses cross-modal reasoning capabilities across text, images, and short videos.

  Updated time: March 31, 2025


# July 31, 2025 Notice
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/changelog/31-07-25



### **Model Decommissioning Notice**

To optimize resources and enhance the overall user experience, Novita will decommission the **Stable Diffusion 3  API** on **August 15, 2025 (UTC 0:00).**

The API will be inaccessible after this date. Please update your applications before then to prevent service interruptions.


# LLM FAQs
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/guides/LLM-FAQ



## Voucher Usage Guide

### What types of voucher does Novita provide?

Novita currently offers the following types of vouchers to help users experience the platform's services:

* **New User Voucher**: Available to first-time registered users for trying out services of various types of models.
* **Referral Voucher**: Earned by inviting others to register and complete tasks on the platform.

## Rate Limits for Model Usage

### What are the RPM limits for different users?

RPM (Requests Per Minute) limits vary based on a user's verification level and account status. For detailed limits, please refer to the official documentation:

<Tip>
  👉 For further assistance, please [book a call with our sales team](https://meet.brevo.com/novita-ai/contact-sales)
</Tip>

## RPM Adjustment and Upgrade Policy

### Can users apply for increased RPM limits?

Yes. Novita allows flexible RPM upgrades based on usage needs. Rules are listed as below:

* **DeepSeek models**: The platform will strive to accommodate reasonable scaling needs.
* **Other models**: RPM increases are evaluated based on model cost and actual user behavior, subject to capacity availability.

### **Application process:**

User → Customer Manager / Tech Support → Product Team Review & Approval

### **What happens if actual usage falls short of the committed RPM?**

If the user's actual RPM remains below the committed level for one consecutive week, the platform will adjust the rate limits policy as:

* Reduce the limit to the peak RPM in the past week, or
* Revert to the model's default rate limit (whichever is lower).

### **Is self-service RPM upgrade supported?**

Yes. Novita plans to launch an **RPM Upgrade Package**, allowing users to manage and increase RPM limits independently, without manual approval.

For further assistance, please [book a call with our sales team](https://meet.brevo.com/novita-ai/contact-sales).

### How to control thinking function of Zai-org/GLM-4.5 when calling its API?

When calling API zai-org/glm-4.5, there always exists some situations where thinking function is not needed. In these cases, if you want to turn thinking function off, you can simply add one fixed sentence called:

```python theme={"system"}
"enable_thinking": false 
```

at the bottom, for example:

```python theme={"system"}
{
  "model": "zai-org/glm-4.5",
  "messages": [
  {
   "role": "user",
   "content": "How is the weather in New York?"
  }
 ],
 "temperature": 0.7,
 "stream": false,
 "max_tokens": 500,
 "tool_choice": "auto",
 "enable_thinking": false
}
```


# AI Gradio 
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/guides/ai-gradio

Explore ai-gradio and Novita AI to build interactive AI demos effortlessly with powerful large language models.

AI-gradio simplifies AI development with its intuitive Python package, built on Gradio's framework. Pairing it with Novita AI unlocks powerful capabilities through cutting-edge large language models, which deliver exceptional value through Novita AI's reliable APIs, optimized performance, and cost-effective pricing—all within AI-gradio's user-friendly interface.

This step-by-step guide will access Novita AI's LLMs API on ai-gradio including methods to install ai-gradio and use Novita AI's LLMs in ai-gradio.

## How to Install ai-gradio

```python theme={"system"}
# Install core package
pip install ai-gradio

# Install with specific provider support
pip install 'ai-gradio[openai]'     # OpenAI support
pip install 'ai-gradio[gemini]'     # Google Gemini support
pip install 'ai-gradio[anthropic]'  # Anthropic Claude support
pip install 'ai-gradio[groq]'       # Groq support

# Install all providers
pip install 'ai-gradio[all]'
```

## How to use Novita AI's LLMs in ai-gradio

### Step 1: Set up environment variables.

* Set NOVITA\_API\_KEY to your Novita API key.

```python theme={"system"}
export NOVITA_API_KEY=<your api key>
```

### Step 2: Modify the app.py entry file.

```python theme={"system"}
import gradio as gr
import ai_gradio
gr.load(
    name='novita:deepseek/deepseek-r1',
    src=ai_gradio.registry,
).launch()
```

### Step 3: Run the app.py file with python.[​](https://novita.ai/docs/guides/third-party-langflow-guide#accessing-novita-ai-llm-api-on-langflow)


# AnythingLLM
Source: https://novita.ai/docs/guides/anythingllm

Step-by-step guide to set up AnythingLLM with Novita AI models for secure, document-based AI applications.

With AnythingLLM, you gain seamless access to a comprehensive suite of Novita AI LLM models, including DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, and more, along with vector database solutions. The integration enables you to effortlessly build and deploy AI-powered applications that handle complex language tasks while ensuring privacy and control.

This guide will walk you through installing and integrating AnythingLLM, connecting Novita AI’s models, enabling web search functionality, and setting up a knowledge base for dynamic and intelligent document interactions.

## **What is AnythingLLM?**

AnythingLLM is a full-stack application designed to give you the flexibility of using both commercial LLMs and popular open-source LLMs, along with vector database solutions. You can run this application locally or host it remotely, offering a secure, private environment to interact intelligently with your documents.

By integrating these resources, AnythingLLM allows you to build a highly functional AI-powered chat interface that handles complex language tasks without compromising privacy or control.

## Key Features

* **Thread-like Structure Workspace**: Workspaces act as threads, organizing related documents in a contained space. Each Workspace isolates documents from others, preserving a unique context for each project or topic.
* **Flexibility for Personal and Businesses:** Install AnythingLLM and its full suite of tools as a single application on your personal desktop. And Fine-grained permissioning and access control for organization is also built-in.
* **Security:** AnythingLLM only talks to the services you connect to and can run fully on your machine without internet connectivity.

## Prerequisites

Before you begin, make sure you have the following:

* Novita AI LLM API Key:
  * Visit [Novita AI’s website](https://novita.ai/) and create an account.
  * After logging in, go to the [Key Management](https://novita.ai/settings/key-management) page to generate your API Key. This key is required to connect Novita AI’s models to AnythingLLM.

    <Frame>
      ![Novita AI key management](https://mintlify.s3.us-west-1.amazonaws.com/novitaai/images/third-party/dify-1.png)
    </Frame>
* **AnythingLLM Software**:Download and install [AnythingLLM software](https://anythingllm.com/desktop) from the official website.

<Frame>
  <img alt="AnythingLLM Software" />
</Frame>

* **A Working Knowledge Base** (Optional):If you plan to use your own documents for knowledge augmentation, prepare them for upload.

## How to install AnythingLLM on Linux locally?

For Linux users, you can install AnythingLLM by running this command on terminal:

curl -fsSL

[<u>https://s3.us-west-1.amazonaws.com/public.useanything.com/latest/installer.sh</u>](https://s3.us-west-1.amazonaws.com/public.useanything.com/latest/installer.sh) | sh

This will download the latest version of AnythingLLM’s AppImage, unpack it, and then supply a symlink to seamlessly run AnythingLLM. This script will unpack the app in `$HOME/AnythingLLMDesktop`.

You can start the app at any time by running `./AnythingLLMDesktop/start`. This will boot the app with full logging.

## Integration Steps

### 1. Connect Novita AI to AnythingLLM

To connect Novita AI’s models with **AnythingLLM**, follow these steps:

* In the application, click on the **🔧 Settings** icon located in the lower-left corner.

  <Frame>
    <img alt="Open AnythingLLM setting" />
  </Frame>
* Go to the **LLM API Providers** section, **and then** select **Novita AI** from the dropdown menu.

  <Frame>
    <img alt="LLM API Providers" />
  </Frame>
* In the **Novita API Key** field, **paste your Novita AI API Key** (the one you generated earlier).
* Click **Save** to complete the integration.

Now, AnythingLLM will have access to all Novita AI’s models, allowing you to use them in your applications.

### 2. Enable Web Search

AnythingLLM allows you to search the web in real-time by enabling web search capabilities. Follow these steps to set up web search functionality:

* **Navigate to Agent Skills**: In the settings or main interface, locate the **Agent Skills** section.
* **Enable Scrape Websites and Web Search**: Toggle the option to turn on both **Scrape Websites** and **Web Search** capabilities.
* **Choose Web Search Providers**: You can choose from the following recommended search providers:
  * **DuckDuckGo**: A free and privacy-focused web search using DuckDuckGo's HTML interface.
  * **Google Search Engine**: Powered by a custom Google Search Engine. It’s free for up to 100 queries per day.
  * **Bing Search**: Powered by the Bing Search API. It’s free for up to 1000 queries per month.

<Frame>
  <img alt="Enable Web Search" />
</Frame>

### 3. Create a Knowledge Base

Next, you’ll want to build a knowledge base for your assistant to use. Follow these steps:

* Click the Upload icon of the Workspace.

  <Frame>
    <img alt="Click the Upload icon of the Workspace" />
  </Frame>
* Upload local documents or website links.
* Select the file(s) or webpage you wish to upload to the workspace.
* Once the file is selected, click **Move to Workspace** to transfer the document(s) to the AnythingLLM workspace.
* Save your files and click **Save and Embed** to finalize the process.
* Your knowledge base is now set up and ready for use.

  <Frame>
    <img alt="Save and embed in AnythingLLM" />
  </Frame>

### 4. Try Asking Questions

In AnythingLLM, ask questions using **@agent**.

The model will respond based on your documents and search results, with citations or references from the files.

<Frame>
  <img alt="Try Asking Questions" />
</Frame>
